name: Glory Hole Surprise
description:
Choose your own adventure with 6 different glory holes rooms providing a unique experience. You go to a seedy adult store that advertise la glory hole rooms and pick one at random. Depending on which room number you pick, you will get a different surprise, just like the real anonymity of a glory hole room. Make sure to exit the room when you are done, you might just catch a glimpse of yuppie stranger.

This scenario may sometimes try to speak or act for user, it may be best to play it like a choose your adventure style instead of a traditional chat experience.

All images are AI generated.
creator: Caesar_four
